welcome: Welcome! Use /vehicle to select your car, then start logging fuel, service, and odometer records.
start_no_vehicle: Welcome! You don't have a vehicle selected yet. Use /vehicle to pick one.
fuel_queued: ⏳ LubeLogger offline. Fuel record saved locally, will sync automatically.
service_queued: ⏳ LubeLogger offline. Service record saved locally, will sync automatically.
odometer_queued: ⏳ LubeLogger offline. Odometer record saved locally, will sync automatically.
invalid_odometer: ❌ Odometer must be a positive integer.
invalid_liters: ❌ Liters must be a positive number.
vehicle_prompt: Select a vehicle from the list below:
no_vehicle: ❌ No active vehicle set. Use /vehicle to select one.
lubelogger_unreachable: ⚠️ LubeLogger is currently unreachable. Please try again later.
queue_empty: ✅ No pending records in the queue.
queue_failed: ❌ A queued record failed after multiple retries.
fuel_ask_full_tank: Was this a full tank fill-up? (yes/no)
